mechanismLead: Professional full-frame DSLR from 2005. Canon's own documentation and exiftool notes confirm that consumer/prosumer CR2 bodies (including 5D series) do not store shutter count in-file.
notes: Shutter count is USB-only (PTP protocol), not embedded in CR2 files. This generation predates CR3 storage mechanism.
